refnamediv.refpurpose: Grow an intensity-connected region from a seed.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imgrayconnected(image, [x y], tolerance) out = imgrayconnected(image, [x y], tolerance, connectivity)

listitem.para: Two-element seed point [x y] in upper-left image coordinates.
Maximum absolute intensity difference from the seed intensity.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a binary region connected to the seed whose intensity differs from the seed value by no more than tolerance.

refsection.title: Examples
